title: Interstellar: Exoplanets
body:
<center>

![](https://i.imgur.com/cU1Tx2F.png?size=512)

**Bringing Real Exo Planets to Galacticraft**

 
This is the beta release.

Every planet that will be added is a confirmed Exoplanet that is documented in the NASA's Exoplanet Archive.

*Special Thanks to Norzeteus150755 for allowing a few of his textures in this mod*

</center>
